options.name: -all_blocks
options.description: all the blocks' constraints must be pulled up

options.name: -block
options.description: Specifies one or more blocks whose constraints need to be pulled up

options.name: -cellview
options.description: {list of <libName cellName viewName>} List of library, cell and view from which constraints need to be pulled.

options.name: -file
options.description: report file containing all the details of constraints

options.name: -inst
options.description: Specifies one or more instances whose constraints need to be pulled up
